mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment (appointment_no, user_id, pet_id, service_id, service_name, service_price, appointment_date, appointment_time, remark, status) VALUES (#{appointmentNo}, #{userId}, #{petId}, #{serviceId}, #{serviceName}, #{servicePrice}, #{appointmentDate}, #{appointmentTime}, #{remark}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, p.name as pet_name, s.name as service_name, u.username as user_name FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN pet_profile p ON a.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN service_item s ON a.service_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, p.name as pet_name, s.name as service_name, u.username as user_name, st.username as staff_name FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN pet_profile p ON a.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN service_item s ON a.service_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user st ON a.staff_id = st.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE appointment SET status = 4, cancel_reason = #{reason} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
UPDATE appointment SET status = 1, staff_id = #{staffId} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE appointment SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE appointment SET status = 3 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 2
UPDATE appointment SET status = 5, cancel_reason = #{reason} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE appointment SET status = 4, cancel_reason = #{reason} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inService, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cancelled, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected, SUM(service_price) as totalIncome FROM appointment WHERE status IN (1,2,3)
